title: Time Knot: Reflection
overview: Two girls are at a beach where one of them finds an old camera. She develops the film and finds out that she's in some of the pictures, despite not remembering the pictures being taken. She then finds out the camera is a model not yet released.

title: Mystery Article File 538
overview: A detective investigating the mysterious disappearances of airplanes, and his investigation into a father and daughter.
